calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:14am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, Beth Wilber-Clerk, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal, respondent James Slade appears through counsel, William E. Shapiro; appellant Brist A. McConico (erroneously sued as McCormick) appears in Pro Per; appellant Hathaway Dinwiddie Construction Co., appears in Pro Per through representative, Paul Dommes.
Mr. Shapiro examines Mr. Slade, previously sworn, under direct examintion. Mr. Dommes and Mr. Slade, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. No new evidence is identified or admitted
9:30am
Matter is submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Continued To Nov-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
